milestones.title: Fix All Failing Docker Builds
milestones.vision: All 37 Docker image build workflows in the arcane-repo GitHub Actions CI pass reliably. Every workflow builds its upstream project, installs dependencies via uv/npm, and pushes a working image to the container registry.
success_criteria: All 37 Docker build workflows pass on GitHub Actions
Final CI run shows 37/37 green (or 32/32 if Sunshine is deferred with documented reason)
All workflow run IDs recorded in run log

key_risks.whyItMatters: cmake interface changed in v2025.924.154138; if pinning to older tag also fails, Sunshine may need a full re-architect of the build script
Vite asset compilation exhausts runner memory even with fallback; may need to skip frontend or reduce parallelism
6 workflows failed simultaneously in May 6 batch; re-dispatching all at once risks the same failure

proof_strategy.whatWillBeProven: Sunshine workflow run shows green status with cmake completing successfully
UNIT3D workflow completes without exit code 254
All 6 re-dispatched workflows complete with green status

milestones.verification_contract: "gh run list --workflow=docker-*.yml --status=success --json status,name,conclusion,databaseId | jq '.[] | select(.conclusion == \"success\")' — all 37 builds show \"success\" conclusion"
milestones.verification_integration: "Workflows run in sequence or small batches; each workflow pushes a Docker image tag to GHCR"
definition_of_done: All 5 applied-fix builds (MemVid, Streamer-Sales, TrendRadar, UNIT3D, MLflow) confirmed green
Sunshine cmake fix applied and confirmed green (or deferred with written reason)
Runner-starved batch (6 workflows) re-dispatched and confirmed green
37/37 (or documented reason for any remaining failures)
milestones.boundary_map_markdown:
"### S01 → done
Produces:
- scripts/dockerfiles/*/Dockerfile — fixed build definitions
- .github/workflows/*.yml — verified working CI

Consumes: nothing"

slices.title: Fix and verify all failing Docker builds
slices.demo: All Docker image build workflows show green/pass status on GitHub Actions — including the previously broken builds and the runner-starved batch.
slices.goal: Fix all 7 broken Docker builds: verify 5 applied fixes are green, fix Sunshine cmake compatibility, and re-dispatch runner-starved workflows.
slices.success_criteria:
- MemVid, Streamer-Sales, TrendRadar, UNIT3D, MLflow all show GitHub Actions green status
- Sunshine builds without cmake errors (upstream tag pinned or script patched)
- AionUI, Harbor-LLM, KAG, WGCloud, Yuxi, CC Gateway re-dispatched and passing
slices.proof_level: GitHub Actions run URL with green status for each workflow
slices.integration_closure: Final GitHub Actions run for each project shows image pushed to registry
